programme.title: Tides Of Time
programme.desc: Supermoon king tides peak. In the Sundarbans, saltwater sickens otters. In China, surfers face the Silver Dragon’s fury. And in Korea, the legal fight for getbols reaches a climax.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Room For Rent
programme.desc: Lonely widow Joyce rents out a room in her house and becomes dangerously obsessed with a younger guest. Desperate for love, she is willing to eliminate anyone hindering her pursuit of happiness, and a chilling tale of obsession unfolds.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A taxi driver who is constantly judging others by his own standards, also reads into their every move and sets out to help ‘victims’ in his own way. When a woman he likes seems to be bullied by her son, he goes about setting things right for her, even resorting to turning himself into a cold-blooded serial killer…

programme.title: The Windmill Massacre
programme.desc: Jennifer joins a tour to explore the renowned windmills of the Netherlands. As their tour coach breaks down on the way, they seek refuge in a creepy shed near a sinister windmill with a dark history. When some tour members suddenly disappear, Jennifer discovers a shared secret among them, linking their fates in a chilling revelation.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: As a young mother grapples with her daughter's mysterious disappearance, a series of eerie events unfold. These events could be linked to the vengeful ghosts of a tragic accident that happened 20 years ago...

programme.title: Get in the Dark
programme.desc: A reporter hears three horror stories when investigating a case of the paper doll spirit 20 years ago. Miss Qiao had died in vain then, and her butler paid a paper craftsman to make a paper doll to be buried with her. Miss Qiao’s spirit is revived to take revenge when the doll’s eyes are drawn, and a series of horrible events begins to happen...

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.title: After the First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: After a beloved Mobile man is gunned down in his front yard, conflicting eyewitness accounts leave detectives wondering if the suspect might have acted in self-defence.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent? (S5)
programme.desc: A Louisiana trail-ride dance party is cut short when shots ring out. A man dies, and his daughter's partner—who was standing nearby—is accused.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: After a 69-year-old woman is found dead in her bathtub, a suspect leads Tulsa detectives on a high-speed chase that ends tragically.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When gambler Scott Martinez, 47, is found eviscerated by a sword in his La Mesa, CA, home, investigators can't tell who is telling the truth within his inner circle.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: A man was arrested for stealing high-end perfumes from a major retailer, and an aspiring mortician struggles to make bail so she can get out for her daughter's homecoming dance.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Dubbed 'the vampire killer,' teen Mathew Hardman thought that taking a life would make him immortal. His victim was an elderly neighbour. After stabbing her, he removed her heart and drank her blood.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. An accused shoplifter launches an expletive-filled freak-out during his virtual bond hearing; a defendant gets tased after trying to escape; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S6)
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A melee erupts as the gallery exits a murder trial hearing; a woman wanted on drug charges gets caught lying to the judge; and more.

programme.title: After the First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, a beloved rapper is gunned down in a hail of bullets from a drive-by shooting. With little hard evidence, detectives and prosecutors need to rely on a tipster to testify.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: An off-duty police officer shoots a man in the chest after a social event explodes into a deadly argument between the two men.

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S2)
programme.desc: When an entire family is found in a decaying pile of bodies by the side of a Florida road, the hunt is on to find what police fear might be two more victims, Adam Matos and his four-year-old autistic son.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The community of Macon, GA, is gripped in a wave of terror when a beautiful law student disappears from her apartment complex. Nobody knows where she could be or what could have happened.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: In the sunny cities of Daytona and Cocoa, ATF Special Agent Perala is reminded of the importance of listening to your gut. His life is threatened when suspects turn the tables on him.

programme.title: City Confidential (S8)
programme.desc: A brutal double murder shocks Northern California's peace-loving and laid-back Marin County. With residents reeling, police chase an elusive killer through three counties.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S1)
programme.desc: Meet real life hired killers operating in organised networks in the Philippines, where even cops and politicians are known to have been targeted.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S1)
programme.desc: Cambodia's under-developed social infrastructure has created an infamous breeding ground for child prostitution and sex tourism.

programme.title: Murder at the Motel
programme.desc: May 13, 2020, Reno, Nevada. Officers from the Reno Police Department are dispatched to the La Quinta Inn after several motel guests report hearing gunshots in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2)
programme.desc: After a woman calls 911 to report shooting her boyfriend in self-defence, investigators uncover a pristine crime scene and disturbing behaviour that cast doubt on her story.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: It's East Packer High's talent show fundraiser and Sadie starts to feel the pressure of running the event. Lay Lay is confident that her song will be a big hit for the show until, she meets a big-time music producer who challenges her writing style.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Captain Man is being a baby about having a baby. Labor pains leave him helpless so Kid Danger and Piper step up to take on a couple of slick grease thieves.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Captain Man and Kid Danger are going to need a little bit of magic and some help from an old friend if they want to catch a thief.

programme.title: Danger Force
programme.desc: Danger Force sees an opportunity to make money fast by hosting Swellview's hottest music festival, but they catch a case of the Kramps when Krampus threatens to ruin their plans.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie sneak out to go to an MMA fight, they get look-alikes to trick Spencer into thinking they’re still at home. Meanwhile, Spencer builds a gigantic version of Newton Balls.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Freddie urge the iCarly fans to vote David Archuleta to victory on America Sings, they feel bad for the runner-up and help him make a music video. Meanwhile, Sam teaches Spencer how to lie like a pro.

programme.title: Victorious
programme.desc: When Tori finds out that Cat is dating her ex-boyfriend, her jealousy threatens to ruin their relationship. Meanwhile, Trina uses fish to make everyone's feet super smooth but at what cost?

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: To boost their babysitting business, Sam and Cat make a commercial that features Dice's beloved dog. A family recognizes the dog and seeks legal ownership, claiming the dog belongs to them.

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: When Leo accidentally saves a subway station full of innocent people, he's inspired to take on a life of crime-fighting vigilantism as the Night Ninja! But has he met his match with the villainous La Fleur and her gang of dognappers?

programme.title: Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The villainous, dog-hating madman known as SCRATCH holds the city's dogs hostage! His only demand? For the Night Ninja to surrender! But Leo, April and the Turtles realize there's more to Scratch than meets the eye.

programme.desc: Rick Twitler returns with a new plan to control Mika's mind through a spooky VR video game. It's up to Danger Force to exer-cise the Rick Twitler out of Mika before they're all plunged back into the Dark Ages for good.

programme.title: The Loud House
